topic.title: How to Add Text, Music, and Audio to a Video
topic.shortdesc: Enhance your video with text overlays, background music, and sound effects.

section.title: Add Text
section.p: 1. Tap the "Text" button in the toolbar.
2. Choose a text style or template.
3. Enter your text and customize the appearance.

section.title: Add Music
section.p: 2. Browse the free music library or upload your own.
4. Adjust volume in the audio track settings.
